arts.ttl: Goals rain down for Newcastle as young Irish January transfer signing shows class
arts.sum: Although all but mathematically impossible to gain promotion, they aim to finish the season strongly and can still influence the top of the table, travelling to The Valley this Sunday (12pm) to face third-placed Charlton before their final home game against second-placed Birmingham City. Having lost their last three in the league, it gives Mel Reay's team time to be ready to prepare for next week's trip to Bristol before the visit of bottom club Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.
